en.text: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064); an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character

senses.gloss_en: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064); an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
